differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune hemolytic anemia (AIHA) with secondary bone marrow suppression
next_steps: Perform a bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with cytogenetics and flow cytometry
Order flow cytometry for PNH (CD55 and CD59 expression on blood cells)
Check serum ferritin, soluble IL-2 receptor (CD25), and fasting triglycerides to assess for HLH
Order a peripheral blood smear for intraerythrocytic organisms (e.g., Babesia)
Monitor lactate dehydrogenase, haptoglobin, and reticulocyte count closely
Obtain serum vitamin B12, folate, and copper levels to rule out nutritional causes of pancytopenia
Perform a comprehensive workup for systemic lupus erythematosus (ANA, anti-dsDNA, complement levels)
Perform bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with cytogenetics and flow cytometry
Order flow cytometry for PNH (CD55 and CD59 expression on blood cells)
Measure reticulocyte count, haptoglobin, and serum ferritin levels
Order soluble IL-2 receptor (CD25) and fasting triglycerides
Assess nutritional status (Vitamin B12, folate, and serum copper/ceruloplasmin)
Perform viral serologies (Parvovirus B19, EBV, CMV)
Obtain cold agglutinin titer and direct antiglobulin test specificity
Avoid empirical steroids until a definitive hematologic diagnosis is established
